gaps.description: src/index.js missing — package.json 'main' points to src/index.js which does not exist on disk

README and Docker document default port as 3000 but bin/agentic-service.js defaults to 1234; Docker healthcheck hits :3000 but containerized service listens on 1234 unless PORT env is set (which it isn't in docker-compose.yml)
ARCHITECTURE.md lines 191-252 contain massive stale CR content (repeated add-section instructions from prior milestones, never cleaned up)

ARCHITECTURE.md directory tree (lines 123-155) lists only 14 src/ files; 21 additional source files exist on disk (embed.js, vad.js, profiler.js, latency-log.js, store/index.js, adapters/*, cli/*, tunnel.js, cert.js, httpsServer.js, middleware.js, sox.js)
Dead import maps #agentic-embed and #agentic-voice in package.json — source files now use agentic-embed/agentic-voice packages directly, but import maps remain
Test pass rate reported ~94% (775/824) with ~49 failures across detector, server, CLI, and milestone tests — mostly stale mocks after refactoring
Admin UI dist/admin/ not built — src/ui/admin/dist/ does not exist; server api.js references dist/admin but no built assets are present
src/runtime/adapters/embed.js is a stub that throws 'not implemented' — actual embed uses vendor agentic-embed via src/runtime/embed.js, breaking the adapter pattern
mDNS/Bonjour for .local hostname discovery — not implemented; only raw LAN IP display available
Docker deployment missing OLLAMA_HOST env var in docker-compose.yml — required for containerized Ollama connectivity
Docker deployment missing ./data volume mount in docker-compose.yml for persistent storage
Server middleware (src/server/middleware.js) is a 4-line error handler — no request validation, rate limiting, or security middleware
